anchorPoint.description: Optional anchor point used when opening the menu (e.g. context menus).

ariaLabel.description: The accessibility label for the menu.

closeOnSelect.description: Whether to close the menu when an option is selected.

composite.description: Whether the menu is composed with other composite widgets.

defaultHighlightedValue.description: The initial highlighted value when uncontrolled.

defaultOpen.description: The initial open state of the menu when uncontrolled.

defaultTriggerValue.description: The default trigger value when uncontrolled.

highlightedValue.description: The controlled highlighted value of the menu item.

id.description: The unique identifier of the menu.

ids.type:
Partial<{
    trigger: string | ((value?: string) => string)
    contextTrigger: string | ((value?: string) => string)
    content: string
    groupLabel: (id: string) => string
    group: (id: string) => string
    positioner: string
    arrow: string
  }>
ids.description: The ids of the elements in the menu. Useful for composition.

loopFocus.description: Whether to loop the keyboard navigation.

navigate.description: Function to navigate to the selected item if it's an anchor element.

open.description: The controlled open state of the menu.

positioning.description: The positioning options for the menu content.

select.description: Fired when a menu item is selected. Mirrors Zag `onSelect`.

typeahead.description: Whether the pressing printable characters should trigger typeahead navigation.

value.description: The menu machine returned by useMenu().
The unique value of the menu item option.

closeOnSelect.description: Whether the menu should be closed when the option is selected.

disabled.description: Whether the menu item is disabled.

valueText.description: The textual value of the option. Used in typeahead navigation.

value.description: The value of the parent menu item this text belongs to.

disabled.description: Whether the parent menu item is disabled.

valueText.description: The textual value of the parent menu item.

value.description: The unique value of the checkbox item.

closeOnSelect.description: Whether the menu should be closed when this option is selected.

disabledInput.description: Whether the checkbox item is disabled.

valueText.description: The textual value of the option. Used in typeahead navigation.

value.description: The unique value of the radio item within its group.

closeOnSelect.description: Whether the menu should be closed when this option is selected.

disabledInput.description: Whether the radio item is disabled.

valueText.description: The textual value of the option. Used in typeahead navigation.

idInput.description: Optional explicit id for the radio group; auto-generated when omitted.

value.description: Controlled selected value within this radio group.

idInput.description: Optional explicit id for the group; auto-generated when omitted.
